expectations.text: Uses openpyxl to create the spreadsheet
expectations.evidence: Uses 'from openpyxl import Workbook' and openpyxl styles

expectations.text: Includes SUM formulas for Total Expenses (not hardcoded values)
Includes a Savings formula (Income - Total Expenses)
Applies financial model color coding (blue for inputs, black for formulas)
expectations.evidence: blue_font = Font(color='0000FF') for inputs, black_font = Font(color='000000') for formulas

expectations.text: Runs LibreOffice recalc to verify formula values
